title: Equivalence fails when using full adder mapping

features.name: full adder module with XOR3 sum and OR-AND cout
features.description: Code should include a full adder module with a 3-input XOR sum expression and an OR-of-ANDs carry-out expression, instantiated in a ripple chain

features.name: ripple carry adder with carry chain wires
features.description: Code should include a ripple carry adder where full adders are instantiated and connected via intermediate carry wires

features.name: extract_fa and techmap full adder workflow
features.description: Code should include a Yosys synthesis script that uses extract_fa command followed by techmap with a full adder map file for equivalence checking
